summary: Iteration 17 - Market Status Feature Testing Complete. All 14 backend tests passed. All frontend tests passed. New feature: MarketStatusBanner shows 'Market Closed - After Trading Hours' with countdown (17h 18m) and next open time (Thursday, 19 Mar 2026 at 09:15 AM IST). Version bumped to 1.8.0.

issues: 404 error for favicon - not affecting functionality

critical_code_review_comments: market_hours_service.py correctly handles IST timezone with timezone(timedelta(hours=5, minutes=30))
NSE_HOLIDAYS dict covers 2025-2026 holidays with proper date format
MarketStatusBanner.jsx has proper data-testid attributes for testing
Countdown timer updates every second with proper cleanup in useEffect
test_credentials: None required - uses public preview URL
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 17 Market Status feature verified. MarketStatusBanner shows market open/close status with countdown. GET /api/market-status and GET /api/market-holidays endpoints work correctly. Version is 1.8.0. All regression tests pass (health, settings, portfolio, instruments, option-chain).

version_bump.description: Version bumped to 1.8.0 in /api/ root endpoint

ui_verified.data_testid_text: market-status-text - shows 'Market Closed - After Trading Hours'
ui_verified.data_testid_next_open: market-next-open - shows 'Next: Thursday, 19 Mar 2026 at 09:15 AM IST'
ui_verified.styling: Gray background/border for after_hours reason, countdown badge in slate color

mocked_apis_note: Market data returns source=none (no Upstox token in preview). Option chain data is SIMULATED. This is expected behavior.
